cases.description: User asks to review a PR by number — triggers the full 5-phase workflow
expectations: Runs gh pr view to pull metadata and description
Runs gh pr diff to inventory changed files
Produces findings with CRITICAL / HIGH / MEDIUM / LOW severity
Every CRITICAL and HIGH finding includes file_path:line_number
Findings include Conventional Comments labels (issue, suggestion, nitpick, etc.)
Includes a Claims vs. reality section verifying PR description against diff
Ends with a severity summary table and a verdict (approve / request changes / comment)

cases.description: User asks to review the open PR without specifying a number
expectations: Runs gh pr list to find open PRs
Asks the user to confirm which PR if more than one is open
Does not guess the PR number silently

cases.description: Review completes with a persisted document under docs/
cases.prompt: review PR #5 and save the review
expectations: Creates a file matching pattern docs/YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS_\[PR_REVIEW\]_pr-5-.*.md
Document contains the required sections: recommendation, severity summary, findings, claims-vs-reality, minimum fixes
Header includes PR URL, branch, author, scope (files, additions, deletions)
Does not commit the document automatically

cases.description: Publishing to GitHub requires explicit user confirmation
expectations: Asks the user to confirm the verdict before posting
Uses gh pr review --request-changes --body-file when findings block merge
Uses gh pr review --approve --body-file when no findings block merge
Does NOT post before receiving explicit user approval
Returns the review URL after posting

cases.description: Skill runs Phase 3 verification before producing the document
cases.prompt: Review PR #5 — the author claims they added webhook signature verification
expectations: Greps the diff for the claimed signature verification symbol
Flags a CRITICAL finding if the symbol is defined but has zero callers
Classifies unsupported security claims as CRITICAL in the Claims vs. reality section

cases.description: /codi-pr-review activates the skill with optional PR argument
expectations: Treats 42 as the PR number via $ARGUMENTS
Runs gh pr view 42 as the first action
Does not list open PRs (PR was specified)

cases.description: Reviewing an uncommitted local diff should NOT trigger this skill — use codi-code-review instead
cases.prompt: review my uncommitted changes before I commit
expectations: Does NOT invoke codi-pr-review
Does NOT run gh pr commands

cases.description: User wants a bug fixed, not a review — use codi-debugging
cases.prompt: the login endpoint returns 500 when email is missing — please fix it
expectations: Does NOT invoke codi-pr-review
Does NOT produce a severity-ranked findings document

cases.description: General documentation request is not a PR review — use codi-project-documentation
cases.prompt: write a README for this repo
expectations: Does NOT invoke codi-pr-review
Does NOT run gh pr commands

cases.description: Whole-codebase security audit is not a PR review — use codi-security-scan
cases.prompt: run an OWASP audit across the whole backend
expectations: Does NOT invoke codi-pr-review
Does NOT scope to a single PR
